mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0 percent, labor market deterioration triggers recession fears that compress equity risk premiums and drive negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 60% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand growth, which increases corporate earnings expectations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform individual series by at least 5 basis points in annualized return or produces negative returns in 50% of co-expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp rebounds in the industrial production index following a contraction signal manufacturing capacity recovery, which triggers short-covering rallies and positive S&P 500 forward returns over one week.
failure_condition: The signal generates negative returns in 65% of post-contraction periods or the 5-day return distribution shows no significant right skew (Jarque-Bera p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate below 0.5 percent indicates extreme monetary accommodation that fuels liquidity-driven asset price inflation, resulting in positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in 55% of low-rate periods or the signal predictive power vanishes when controlling for VIX levels (coefficient insignificant at 95% confidence).

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total employment and falling unemployment rates indicates labor market tightening that boosts wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.05) in a multivariate regression or forward returns are negative in 50% of divergence episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in housing starts reflect rising consumer confidence and construction sector activity, which immediately lifts equity valuations and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over one week.
failure_condition: The signal produces negative 5-day returns in 60% of observations or the rank correlation with forward returns remains below 0.01 over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production falls below 95 percent of its 2017 baseline, manufacturing weakness signals late-cycle stagnation that compresses profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over one month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 55% of triggered instances or the signal fails to predict returns after adjusting for term premium movements (t-stat < 1.96).
